title: Monitor soils under irrigation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor soils under irrigation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess the physical properties of irrigated soil

pcs.text: Identify the profile of irrigated soil
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the profile of irrigated soil?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the profile of irrigated soil.

pcs.text: Determine soil texture and structure within the soil layers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine soil texture and structure within the soil layers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine soil texture and structure within the soil layers.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret tests for organic matter level in soil.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the infiltration rate for irrigated soil.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure soil moisture levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure soil moisture levels.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the environmental impacts of cultivation and watering practices on the physical properties of soil.
